title: The Boxer from Somewhere Else: The Ken Buchanan Story
original_title: The Boxer from Somewhere Else: The Ken Buchanan Story
overview: Charts the life and career of Scottish boxer Ken Buchanan, the 1970-71 undisputed lightweight world champion.
